# Platform v2.4.0 — API migration (excerpt)

- CLI flag `--metrics-port` renamed to `--metrics-port-v2`.
- Config field `payments.apiVersion` must be set to `v2` for the payments service.
- Argo CD health checks now require sync wave annotations on Deployments.

Source: https://docs.example.local/platform/v2.4.0/migration
